title: Property Consultant - Panchshil Realty - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Panchshil Realty - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Panchshil Realty has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Panchshil Realty:
Panchshil Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panchshil Realty!
